author: BiCuriousGeorge#8804
install_msg: The Vault has been opened. Use `[p]vault` to enter.
name: vault
short: Collectible card game powered by ChodeCoin
description: The Vault — a dark fantasy collectible card system. Buy card packs with ChodeCoin, collect Superpowers, Allies, Companions, Items, Weapons, and Armor. Equip your loadout, manage your inventory, and use your cards in DnD-style campaigns run by an AI Dungeon Master.
